The '''Imperial Assault Shuttle''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used primarily by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="SOTG07">[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]</ref> and the [[Second Imperium]]. It resembled the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]].<ref name="YJK:SA" />

==Characteristics==
As a larger capital ship variant of the ''Lambda''-class shuttle, the assault shuttle was capable of carrying a significant complement of troops and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] as well as holding cells for prisoners.<ref name="YJK:DK">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Darkest Knight]]''</ref> The most notable distinction from the ''Lambda''-class was the [[Docking tube/Legends|cofferdam]] that had been placed beneath the bridge. The outer rim of the cofferdam was lined with [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]], which were used to cut through the hulls of [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] or other vessels just prior to a boarding action. As such, the shuttle was used primarily in boarding operations and even on small strategic raids.<ref name="YJK:SA" />

==History==
Modified assault shuttles were used in conjunction with Rebel [[Assault Frigate Mark I]]s, being docked at the top of each frigate's superstructure.<ref name="SOTG07" />

In the [[Battle of Ciutric]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Assault Shuttle was used to attempt an escape by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Lorrir/Legends|Lorrir]] and [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Ysanne Isard's clone]], but was destroyed by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="XW:IR">''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''</ref>

During the [[Shadow Academy]]/[[Second Imperium]] insurgence of [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], a modified version was used to [[Raid on GemDiver Station|raid]] [[GemDiver Station]] over [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]]<ref name="YJK:SA" /> and to [[Raid on Coruscant (Second Imperium Crisis)|board and capture]] the [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] [[Adamant (bulk cruiser)|''Adamant'']] above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="YJK:TLO">''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''</ref> Later, a camouflaged assault shuttle was also used to transport a considerable complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and ground troops for a small [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Imperium Crisis)|strategic raid]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to obtain computer units for installing on the Second Imperium's hastily-assembled fleet of capital ships.<ref name="YJK:DK" />
